overview: SkillSnap is a 10-second audio skill marketplace where users record and share bite-sized audio tips, browse skills by category and tags, spend credits to unlock them, rate what they learn, and compete on a leaderboard of top contributors.
features: Record or upload 10-second audio skill clips
Browse and filter skills by category and tags
Credit-based unlock system (30 free credits on signup)
5-star rating system with real-time creator score updates
Leaderboard of top contributors by rating
My Skills page to manage published content
Internet Identity sign-in with user profile
